name: Stainless Steel Lota
description: Perfect for daily household use and traditional rituals. Made from heavy-gauge, food-grade stainless steel with a high-lustre mirror polish that resists rust and corrosion.
specs: Capacity: 1 Litre, Material: 202 Grade Stainless Steel, Mirror Polish Finish

name: Stainless Steel Glass (Set of 6)
description: Premium rust-resistant drinking glasses, perfectly weighted and designed with smooth rolled rims for a comfortable drinking experience. Features a bright white reflections mirror finish.
specs: Capacity: 300ml per glass, Pack of 6, Food-safe, Dishwasher safe

name: Stainless Steel Tiffin Box (3-Tier)
description: Classic leak-resistant tiered lunch carrier, ideal for keeping home-cooked meals fresh and warm during school, office, or travel. Equipped with heavy-duty side-locking clips.
specs: 3 Compartments, Secure Side Clips, Leak-proof Silicone Seals

name: Stainless Steel Fry Pan (Tri-ply)
description: Heavy-duty professional frying pan featuring a tri-ply capsule bottom for even heat distribution. Suitable for both gas stovetops and modern induction cooktops.
specs: Diameter: 24cm, Thickness: 2.5mm, Tri-ply Aluminum Core & Steel

name: Stainless Steel Serving Tray
description: Elegant rectangular platter featuring integrated handles and a premium matte-brushed surface with a mirror-finished rim. Perfect for catering, hotels, and dinner hosting.
specs: Size: 14x10 inches, Heavy Gauge Steel, Raised Spill-proof Edges

name: Stainless Steel Bowl (Katori - Set of 6)
description: Premium deep-walled small bowls, ideal for serving dal, curries, raita, desserts, or snacks. Designed with a stackable structure for smart cabinet storage.
specs: Diameter: 3.5 inches, Pack of 6, Stackable space-saving design

name: Stainless Steel Pressure Cooker (5L)
description: Highly durable outer lid pressure cooker built with premium quality steel and a heavy sandwich base for rapid, energy-efficient cooking. Includes multi-stage safety valves.
specs: Capacity: 5 Litres, Gas & Induction Friendly, Ergonomic Stay-Cool Handles

name: Stainless Steel Dinner Plate (Set of 6)
description: Thick-gauge elegant dining plates with a gorgeous mirror-polished finish and smooth safe borders. Perfect for serving meals in residential homes, hostels, and catering services.
specs: Diameter: 12 inches, Pack of 6, Premium polished border, Scratch-resistant

name: Stainless Steel Sauce Pan (With Lid)
description: Professional quality deep saucepan, ideal for boiling milk, preparing tea, making soup, and simmering sauces. Crafted with a thick bottom and sturdy riveted handle.
specs: Capacity: 1.5 Litres, Heat-resistant handles, Induction bottom compatible

name: Stainless Steel Water Jug
description: Exquisitely designed water server featuring a curved welded handle, anti-drip pouring spout, and an immaculate mirror-finish exterior. Suitable for home dining and commercial hotels.
specs: Capacity: 1.5 Litres, Anti-rust food-grade, Curved pour control snout

name: Stainless Steel Kitchen Storage Container Set
description: Airtight modular storage boxes designed to keep grains, spices, flour, and snacks crisp and fresh. Built with transparent acrylic window slots to easily view content volume.
specs: Set of 3, Airtight locking seals, Visual transparent content window

name: Premium Stainless Steel Spoon Set
description: Exquisite dining spoons featuring mirror-finish polish and highly comfortable ergonomic styling. High-grade steel prevents bending or tarnishing.
specs: Set of 6 spoons, Thickness: 2mm, Heavy-gauge food-grade 304 steel

name: Stainless Steel Lunch Box
description: Durable, eco-friendly stainless steel lunch container designed with tight snap clamps and a sleek layout. Extremely hygienic and non-toxic for kids and adults.
specs: Single Tier large size, Leak-resistant, BPA-Free safe steel

name: Stainless Steel Tea Cup Set
description: Elegant double-walled steel tea cups that keep your beverages piping hot while remaining perfectly cool to the touch on the outside. Sophisticated mirror finish design.
specs: Set of 6 cups, Capacity: 150ml each, Double-walled thermal protection

name: Premium Stainless Steel Kitchen Rack
description: Multi-tier robust wall-mountable or counter-top kitchen shelf organizer, designed to dry and hold plates, bowls, cups, and spoons. Extremely sturdy and space saving.
specs: 3-tier heavy-duty modular rack, Rust-proof coating, Load capacity: 25kg

name: Premium Stainless Steel Dinner Set (24-Piece)
description: Complete elegant matching dinner set containing dinner plates, bowls, tumblers, and spoons.
specs: 24-piece full family dining set, Premium polish

name: Heavy-Duty Kadai (With Glass Lid)
description: Bespoke professional cookware wok with double riveted helper handles and custom-fit tempered safety glass steam-vent lid.

name: Stainless Steel Colander & Strainer
description: Robust deep colander with standard micro-perforated water draining holes, flat stable base, and convenient dual side grips.
specs: Diameter: 22cm, Perforated drainage loops, Smooth-rolled rim
